name: search_bar
html_template: <form class="flex w-full gap-3"><input type="text" class="flex-1 rounded-xl border border-slate-300 px-4 py-3" placeholder="{placeholder}" /><button class="rounded-xl bg-slate-900 px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-white">{text}</button></form>
description: A horizontal search form with input and button.
